context: Tests whether the agent correctly configures nginx for Magento multi-store routing, using map directives for MAGE_RUN_CODE and MAGE_RUN_TYPE, placing fastcgi_param directives inside the PHP location block, selecting the correct run type (store vs website) based on customer base separation, and keeping routing config at the infrastructure layer.

checklist.name: map directive for MAGE_RUN_CODE
checklist.description: Uses an nginx 'map' block (map $http_host $MAGE_RUN_CODE) to map hostnames to Magento store/website codes, rather than hardcoding per server block or setting in application code

checklist.name: map directive for MAGE_RUN_TYPE
checklist.description: Uses a separate nginx 'map' block (map $http_host $MAGE_RUN_TYPE) to map hostnames to the routing type

checklist.name: fastcgi_param inside PHP location block
checklist.description: Both fastcgi_param MAGE_RUN_CODE and fastcgi_param MAGE_RUN_TYPE directives are placed inside the 'location ~ \.php$' block, not outside it at the server level

checklist.name: Language storefronts use store routing
checklist.description: UK and German storefronts are mapped to MAGE_RUN_TYPE 'store', not 'website'

checklist.name: B2B portal uses website routing
checklist.description: B2B portal is mapped to MAGE_RUN_TYPE 'website'

checklist.name: hostnames keyword in map blocks
checklist.description: map blocks include the 'hostnames' keyword to enable hostname-based matching

checklist.name: Notes explain store vs website distinction
checklist.description: Documentation explains that 'store' routing is chosen for language variants that share a customer base, while 'website' routing is chosen for the B2B portal because it requires a separate customer base

checklist.name: Default empty values in map
checklist.description: map blocks include a 'default' entry mapping to an empty string for unrecognized hosts

checklist.name: No MAGE_RUN_CODE in index.php
checklist.description: The configuration does NOT set MAGE_RUN_CODE or MAGE_RUN_TYPE inside a PHP file (index.php or similar) — routing is handled entirely at the nginx level

checklist.name: MAGE_RUN_CODE uses store view codes for store-type routes
checklist.description: For domains mapped to MAGE_RUN_TYPE 'store', the corresponding MAGE_RUN_CODE value is a store view code (not a website code)
